query: SELECT tgeActorId, eventType, tgeTitle, tgeSeverity, tgeSource, eventDate FROM threat_group_events WHERE tgeActorId = 'fulcrumsec' ORDER BY eventDate DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT tgeActorId, eventType, tgeTitle, tgeSeverity, tgeSource, eventDate FROM threat_group_events WHERE tgeActorId = 'fulcrumsec' ORDER BY eventDate DESC;
